raw_output:
PR #1 correctness review, rounds 2/3/4 (Codex CLI 0.145.0, gpt-5.6-sol, read-only sandbox, independent passes).

ROUND 4 (final, head ca27180), verbatim: "X1 - Merge-base binding makes the submodule regression test vacuous - P3. test_hash_sees_submodule_pointer_change_despite_ignore_all compares hashes whose merge-base IDs differ, so it passes even if the gitlink diff is hidden and --ignore-submodules=none is removed. Keep the merge-base constant while varying the gitlink diff. tests/test_review_gate.py:268, scripts/review_gate.py:169. Overall assessment: The implementation and rewritten staleness rule are otherwise consistent. The test suite could not run in this read-only environment because pytest requires a writable temporary directory."

ROUND 3 (head b511d76/77c4024): X1 (nit) trailing whitespace in docs/process/review-gate.md:128 fails git diff --check. Overall: "correct and internally consistent, with robust fail-closed artifact validation and coherent CI/documentation cross-references. No substantive correctness defects."

ROUND 2 (head 3ab83a2): X1 (P1) PR #1 missing its mandatory review artifacts (docs/reviews/pr-1/ absent; gate fails) — bootstrap state; resolved by the artifact commit this file is part of. X2 (P3) non-UTF-8 artifacts raise uncaught UnicodeDecodeError instead of a diagnostic, contradicting the suite's stated invariant. X3 (P3) finding id/summary keys checked for presence only — null/objects/empty strings passed, weakening the permanent audit record. Overall: "core hash binding, threshold logic, base-copy workflow, and documented flags are internally consistent."

--- Post-review delta note (orchestrator, attested at final head 28f1fdc) ---
After the round-4 legs ran on ca27180, their own validated findings were fixed
and committed as 28f1fdc: the vacuous submodule/non-empty-diff hash tests were
rebuilt around a constant merge-base (mutation-verified: the submodule test
fails when --ignore-submodules=none is removed), diff.indentHeuristic pinned,
merge-base failure diagnostic given an unrelated-histories fallback, docstring
and rule-4 wording softened to name the require-up-to-date ruleset dependency,
doc pin list synced. 44/44 tests pass; git diff --check clean. The attested
hash covers the fixed state. Battery history: round 1 (Claude legs) -> fixes;
delta verification caught a P1 the fixes introduced (orderFile crash) -> fixed;
round 2/3 (codex legs + Claude re-review) found the submodule ignore=all hash
bypass (high, reproduced) and the merge-base binding gap (high/P2, found
independently by both models) -> fixed; round 4 (all four legs) -> no new
validated blocking findings: converged.

findings.summary: PR #1 missing its mandatory review artifacts (bootstrap state)
findings.reason: Documented bootstrap: the battery produces the artifacts; resolved by the commit adding this file.

findings.summary: Non-UTF-8 artifacts raise uncaught UnicodeDecodeError instead of diagnostic
findings.reason: UnicodeDecodeError added to the unreadable-JSON handler + regression test.

findings.summary: Finding id/summary not type/content-validated — null or empty passed
Trailing whitespace in review-gate.md fails git diff --check
Merge-base binding made the submodule regression test vacuous
findings.reason: Constant-merge-base rebuild, mutation-verified. Independently found by Claude R4 (validated P2 there; fix identical).
